articles.title: India's UPI goes live in Greece with Eurobank, Piyush Goyal attends
articles.description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal witnessed the launch of India's UPI services at Eurobank headquarters in Athens. The partnership enables instant, secure, and low-cost money transfers, marking a significant milestone in India's global digital expansion.

articles.title: TikTok to settle with teen plaintiff before California social media trial, law firm says
articles.description: June 30 : TikTok has agreed to settle a lawsuit brought by a teenager who claimed the platform damaged his mental health, a spokesperson for the plaintiff's law firm said Tuesday.The settlement was reached in principle, but the details have not yet been finalized, according to a spokesperson for Morgan & Morg

articles.title: US Student Loans' Rules Change From July 1: What Borrowers Need to Know
articles.description: The Biden administration's SAVE plan will phase out, requiring borrowers to switch to new options, potentially resulting in higher payments.

articles.title: CM releases Rs 2,482 cr to 42L farmers under Rythu Bharosa
articles.description: Hyderabad: Chief minister A Revanth Reddy on Tuesday released Rs 2,482 crore towards Rythu Bharosa to nearly 42 lakh farmers and announced that the st.

articles.title: AM/NS takes over banks' claims linked to Essar Group promoters' personal guarantees
articles.description: "Banks had claims attached to the personal guarantees issued by the Essar promoters which was linked to the Essar Steel resolution. AM/NS' plan had made specific provisions to pay off these liabilities too, but there were some legal issues which are now resolved, allowing banks and AM/NS to complete this deal," said a person familiar with the details.

articles.title: Stocks to Watch Today: Kotak Bank, KPIT Tech, Waterways Leisure, Advit Jewels, Genus Power, Ivalue Info, Cupid, RailTel, Rane Madras in focus on 01 July
articles.description: Stocks to Watch, 01 Jul: Stocks like KPIT Technologies, Cupid, Hexagon Nutrition, Kotak Mahindra Bank, RailTel Corporation of India, Tata Communications, Rane Madras, RHI SRF, Genus Power Infrastructures, Indo Tech Transformers, Ivalue Infosolutions, and Axiscades Technologies will be in focus on July 1.

articles.description: June 30 : UEFA has imposed sanctions on 14 clubs, including Juventus, Newcastle United, Aston Villa and Chelsea, for breaching its financial sustainability rules for the 2025-26 season, European soccer's governing body announced on Tuesday.UEFA said the First Chamber of its Club Financial Control Body had com

articles.title: Stocks in news: Kotak Mahindra Bank, Tata Motors, HDFC Bank, IndiGo, Coal India
articles.description: Indian markets experienced a volatile yet narrow trading range, concluding marginally lower as consolidation persists. Analysts await a decisive breakout above 24,200. Key stocks like Tata Motors, HDFC Bank, IndiGo, Coal India, and Kotak Mahindra Bank are in focus due to significant developments including new product launches, executive appointments, and strategic investments. Coal India plans substantial R&D spending to enhance productivity and reduce emissions.

articles.title: Bandhavgarh sees record 2L tourists
articles.description: Jabalpur: Bandhavgarh Tiger Reserve has recorded its highest-ever tourist footfall and revenue, with more than 2.12 lakh visitors generating around Rs.

articles.title: In Graphics: How GST cuts triggered a rally for Indian businesses
articles.description: Government analysis reveals that last September's Goods and Services Tax rate adjustments led to a significant expansion of the tax base. Higher taxable supplies more than compensated for reduced tax rates, boosting average monthly taxable supply by 22.5% in the latter half of FY26. This positive outcome marks a notable impact as the GST nears its ninth anniversary.

articles.title: Economy resilient but risks from monsoon, geopolitical uncertainties remain: Finance Ministry report
articles.description: Finance Ministry: India's economy remains resilient, but the Finance Ministry warned that uneven monsoon, emerging El Niño conditions and geopolitical uncertainties could weigh on growth, despite easing inflation and strong exports.

articles.title: Noida authority auctions land parcels to Godrej Properties, VRC construction
articles.description: Noida Authority has successfully auctioned two prime land parcels in Sector 151 for residential projects, fetching a total of Rs 666 crore from Godrej Properties and VRC Construction. This development, coupled with the upcoming Noida International Airport and robust infrastructure, is fueling significant growth in the region. Experts predict substantial increases in property values over the next two years, underscoring Noida's burgeoning real estate market.

articles.title: Dixon-Vivo joint venture inches close to securing final govt approval
articles.description: The proposed joint venture has already secured clearance from an inter-ministerial panel, with formal government approval expected soon to operationalise the partnership

articles.title: APCRDA invites bids for manpower, knowledge support services for Amaravati
articles.description: APCRDA seeks bids for manpower and knowledge support services in Amaravati, aiming to enhance project operations with skilled personnel.

articles.title: Two Trades for Today: An auto sector major for a 6.25% upmove, a mid-cap pharma stock for a gain of almost 7%
articles.description: Our technical analysts identify select stocks every trading day that may gain momentum even in volatile markets. Here are the technical calls for today.

articles.title: Bank credit to industry grows at robust 17.5% in May: RBI
articles.description: Indian banks witnessed a significant surge in credit to industries, with a robust 17.5% annual growth in May. This expansion was driven by accelerated lending to large corporations and sustained healthy growth in the Micro and Small Enterprises (MSE) sector. Advances to agriculture and allied activities also saw a strong uptick. Personal loans and the services sector also recorded impressive growth rates, indicating a vibrant economic landscape.

articles.title: IRDAI chairman urges insurers to build affordable products for Rs 5-25 lakh cover to boost penetration
articles.description: IRDAI Chairman Ajay Seth called for insurance companies to prioritise covering a broader range of unique lives rather than merely chasing premium targets, especially among middle-income families. He stressed the need for simple and affordable insurance products, encouraging insurers to ask if consumers can invest Rs 100-500 monthly for added security.

articles.title: IndiGo Gets New Group HR Head Months After Rostering Row; KS Bakshi Takes Charge In July
articles.description: With over three decades of experience Bakshi is set to take charge from July 20, 2026 and willwork closely with IndiGo's leadership.

articles.title: 'Inflation and unholy mess:' Why Nithin Kamath thinks RBI may not stay soft on interest rates
articles.description: Nithin Kamath warned that a weak monsoon caused by El Niño and rising global oil prices linked to the Iran conflict could sharply increase inflation in India. He said higher food and fuel costs may force the RBI to raise interest rates, hurting growth and market sentiment.

articles.title: India’s ‘401K moment’? HDFC MF CEO Navneet Munot says savers are turning into investors
articles.description: HDFC Mutual Fund CEO Navneet Munot said India’s shift from savings to disciplined investing is becoming a social change, but deeper capital flows are needed.

articles.title: Adani Power Ltd eases for fifth straight session
articles.description: Adani Power Ltd is quoting at Rs 222, down 2.22% on the day as on 13:19 IST on the NSE. The stock jumped 87.69% in last one year as compared to a 6.32% slide in NIFTY and a 8.74% spurt in the Nifty Energy index.

articles.title: Shriram Finance Ltd gains for fifth session
articles.description: Shriram Finance Ltd is quoting at Rs 1046.55, up 1.35% on the day as on 12:44 IST on the NSE. The stock is up 50.27% in last one year as compared to a 6.23% fall in NIFTY and a 1.7% fall in the Nifty Financial Services.

articles.title: Sensex, Nifty hover near flatline; broader market outperforms
articles.description: At 14:30 IST, the barometer index, the S&P BSE Sensex shed 41.76 points or 0.06% to 76,686.61. The Nifty 50 index slipped 8.90 points or 0.04% to 23,936.70.

articles.description: For Eternal Ltd, JM broadly maintained its operating assumptions across businesses. However, it upped its target on the stock to Rs 440 from Rs 400, mainly on account of a roll-forward to June 2027.

articles.title: OYO parent Prism files updated IPO papers for Rs 6,650 crore issue: What investors should know
articles.description: Hospitality firm Prism, parent of OYO, has filed updated papers for a Rs 6,650 crore IPO, comprising only a fresh issue of shares. The company plans to use most proceeds to repay borrowings. Prism reported a significant jump in revenue and profit for the first nine months of FY26, driven by its US business. S&P Global Ratings also revised Prism's outlook to 'Positive'.

articles.title: Sensex down 550 pts from day's high, Nifty below 23,900: Selling in IT shares among key factors behind market decline
articles.description: Sensex, Nifty declined amid sharp selling pressure in IT shares on worries about rate hikes in the U.S.

articles.title: BlackBerry's Big Comeback: What's fueling the stock rally?
articles.description: Strong earnings, upbeat guidance and accelerating growth in BlackBerry's QNX automotive software business have reignited investor confidence, driving the stock to a fresh 52-week high.

articles.title: A Fintech Stock That’s Up 80% This Quarter Still Has Wall Street Bulls Asking For More
articles.description: Piper Sandler initiated coverage of Affirm with an ‘Overweight’ rating and a $103 price target, which indicates an upside potential of nearly 26%.

articles.description: The statement also provides details regarding agricultural land owned by members of the Chief Minister's family. According to the government, the majority of land owned by Seema Yadav was acquired between 2008 and 2019.

articles.title: Apple Accuses CCI of 'Copy-Pasting' Rivals' Claims in Antitrust Investigation
articles.description: Apple has said the Competition Commission of India (CCI) relied too heavily on complaints from rivals and did not carry out an independent investigation before concluding that the company broke competition rules. In a June 25 filing, Apple asked for the findings to be cancelled. The case is part of Apple's dispute with India's Competition Commission over alleged unfai...

articles.title: Wall Street rebounds as AI rally lifts tech stocks while easing oil concerns boost investor sentiment
articles.description: The S&P 500 snapped a five-day losing streak as AI stocks surged on South Korea's chip investment plans, oil prices steadied on hopes of Iran talks and Treasury yields eased despite lingering inflation concerns.

articles.title: Bandhan Bank CFO Rajeev Mantri resigns
articles.description: Bandhan Bank has announced that its chief financial officer (CFO) and key managerial personnel (KMP), Rajeev Mantri, has tendered his resignation, citing the pursuit of another opportunity for career growth.

articles.title: ‘ ₹1-crore receipts unreconciled’: Audit flags lapses at Chandigarh airport
articles.description: The inspection report, following an audit conducted between January 5 and 9 this year, paints a picture of weak financial control and poor inventory management

articles.title: Warren Buffett skips donation to Gates Foundation amid Epstein review: Report
articles.description: Warren Buffett, the chairman of Berkshire Hathaway, has reportedly postponed his customary mid-year donation to the Gates Foundation. This delay stems from his desire to await the outcomes of a review concerning the foundation's connections to the late Jeffrey Epstein. Buffett is expected to make his decision later this year, potentially around his Thanksgiving letter, according to sources cited by The Wall Street Journal.

articles.title: Property sale revived after 9-year payment delay: Telangana HC lets buyer keep property deal alive with 12% interest penalty
articles.description: A Telangana High Court ruling has revived a property deal after a buyer's nine-year delay in paying the Rs 8 lakh balance. Despite the seller's initial opposition, the court condoned the extensive delay, allowing the buyer to complete the sale by depositing the outstanding amount with 12% annual interest. The court emphasized that the seller's failure to appeal the original decree prevented him from opposing the sale now.

articles.title: ‘India Only Country That Rivals China’: US Under Secretary Hails New Delhi's Engineering Talent
articles.description: Helberg noted that the combination of India's booming population, vast engineering pool, and rapid economic growth makes it a prime market for creating cutting-edge services.

articles.title: Oil prices ease as investors await US-Iran talks; Brent crude falls to $72 per barrel
articles.description: Oil prices dipped as markets weighed potential US-Iran talks in Doha against ongoing regional instability. Despite recent missile exchanges and attacks on ships, crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz have seen an uptick. Investors are cautiously optimistic about diplomatic efforts, though tangible signs of de-escalation remain elusive. Analysts suggest Gulf oil flows are steadily recovering, potentially returning to pre-conflict levels soon.

articles.title: Tech Mahindra Shares in Focus: HDFC Securities Maintains Add - Check New Target Price
articles.description: Despite the positive outlook, the brokerage noted that the stock trades at a premium valuation compared to peers, which may cap upside in the near term.

articles.title: Trump urges US gas retailers to cut prices to $2.50 a gallon, warns of 'big problems'
articles.description: US President Donald Trump urged gasoline retailers to cut fuel prices to around $2.50 a gallon, warning of "big problems" if they fail to act despite falling oil prices.

articles.title: Big relief: From July 1, no limits on petrol-diesel as govt lifts ban on commercial buyers
articles.description: Fuel buying rules for commercial users have been rolled back after recent stability in supply. Transport and industrial operations are expected to run with fewer restrictions on fuel access.

articles.title: SLS Stock Hits Over 5-Year High: Retail Traders Bet Big On Breaking $25 As AML Readout Looms
articles.description: Recently updated change-of-control terms also fueled buyout chatter by outlining executive payouts and full equity acceleration related to a change in control.
